title: Payoneer Aims to Launch Stablecoin-Focused Digital Bank
message_html: Payoneer Aims to Launch Stablecoin-Focused Digital Bank ...
snippet: Cross-border payment FinTech Payoneer applied to the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to open a digital bank, according to a Tuesday (Feb. 24) press release. PAYO Digital Bank, N.A., would be a national trust bank aimed at supporting “stablecoin-enabled infrastructure for global businesses,

title: 21shares rolls out spot SUI ETF on Nasdaq, marking the latest fund tied to Sui to launch
message_html: 21shares rolls out spot SUI ETF on Nasdaq, marking the latest fund tied to Sui to launch ...
snippet: Another ETF tracking the price of Sui has launched this week, as digital asset manager 21shares debuts the 21Shares Spot SUI ETF.

title: Kraken rolls out round-the-clock perps for gold, major indexes and stocks like Apple, Nvidia and Tesla
message_html: Kraken rolls out round-the-clock perps for gold, major indexes and stocks like Apple, Nvidia and Tesla ...
snippet: These xStocks perps will provide eligible non-U.S. clients in over 110 countries with 24/7 tokenized equities exposure.

title: EU ECON committee report calls for multi-issuer stablecoin legislation
message_html: EU ECON committee report calls for multi-issuer stablecoin legislation ...
snippet: The EU Parliament’s Committee on Economic and Monetary Affairs (ECON) has published a document entitled “digital assets – challenges for the competitiveness and integrity of the European Union’s financial system.” The report and resolution have not yet been adopted by the ECON Committee but include
